title: Execution of writs directed to predecessors
doc_html:
§5547.  Execution of writs directed to predecessors

A sheriff may carry into execution all writs and judicial orders directed to his predecessor and not acted upon by him.

Redesignated from R.S. 33:1441 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §3.
